title: INC-1029 Slack triage: customer row-count mismatch

messages.text: customer_daily_migration_dag failed at validate_row_counts. Source 1588, target 1297.
Check processing_date. Late-arriving records often land with offset dates, so exact-date validation is unsafe.
Use the plus/minus 3 day processing_date window. Rerun validate_row_counts and dq_reconciliation_check only.
Do not clear the full DAG. Downstream tables are incremental and full reruns duplicate published metrics.
